ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Moderation status of the comment (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the comment */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is deleted */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, moderator, admin) */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the post was last updated */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the post is deleted */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Total number of views for the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_flags" (
  "flag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flag */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being flagged */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who raised the flag */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for flagging the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the flag was raised */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the flag (e.g., pending, reviewed, resolved) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the flag */,
  "resolution_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the resolution of the flag */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the flag is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_flags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was liked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the like was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the reply was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Moderation status of the reply (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who reviewed the reply */,
  "moderation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the reply is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_follows" (
  "follow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follow relationship */,
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "followee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being followed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the follow relationship was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_followee_id FOREIGN KEY ("followee_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_follows_follower_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the tag was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who should receive the notification */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., comment, like, follow) */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "read_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was read */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "is_deleted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification is deleted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each edit in the comment's history */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment that was edited */,
  "content" TEXT /* Text content of the comment after the edit */,
  "edited_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was edited */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who approved the edit */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the edit was reverted */,
  "revert_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post that was viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the view occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_views_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)
